description.ko: 유기적 식물학과 디지털 인프라의 교차점을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 광섬유 맥락과 홀로그램 꽃가루가 주입된 생물 발광 꽃을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A visionary exploration of the intersection between organic botany and digital infrastructure, showcasing a bioluminescent flower infused with fiber-optic veins and holographic pollen.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro shot of a futuristic flower named FLORA-9, translucent petals with embedded glowing circuitry, fiber-optic filaments as stamens, digital particles floating in the air, deep forest background with neon glitch effects, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, synthwave aesthetics, organic meets tech.
